state.description: Complete board state including piece placement, castling rights, en passant target, move clocks, and active player

fields.board: list of 8 rows, each a list of 8 atoms, each empty | white_king | white_queen | white_rook | white_bishop | white_knight | white_pawn | black_king | black_queen | black_rook | black_bishop | black_knight | black_pawn. Row 1=rank8 (black back rank) at top, row 8=rank1 (white back rank) at bottom, col 1=file a left
fields.turn: atom white | black, the player to move
fields.castling_rights: list of atoms any subset of white_kingside | white_queenside | black_kingside | black_queenside representing available castling rights
fields.en_passant_target: null or [row,col] pair indicating square available for en passant capture
fields.halfmove_clock: integer, counts halfmoves since last pawn advance or capture
fields.fullmove_number: integer, counts full moves, incremented after Black's move

move.description: Move a piece from one square to another, possibly with promotion, castling, or en passant

parameters.promotion: atom none | queen | rook | bishop | knight, choice when a pawn reaches last rank

legal_move_conditions: The square at (from_row,from_col) contains a piece of color equal to turn
The target square at (to_row,to_col) is empty or contains an opponent piece unless capturing en passant
The piece moves according to its movement pattern: king one square any direction, rook straight, bishop diagonal, queen straight or diagonal, knight in L-shape, pawn forward or diagonal capture
Non-knight pieces have a clear path between source and destination
Move does not leave or place own king in check
For castling: king moves two columns from original, involved rook has not moved, path clear, king not in, through, or into check, and castling right exists
For en passant: opponent pawn moved two squares last move ending adjacent, current pawn moves diagonally to empty square behind that pawn
For promotion: pawn reaches last rank and promotion parameter is not none
apply_move_effects: Move the piece from source to destination, removing any captured piece at destination or en passant target
If castling, move the rook to its square adjacent to king
If a pawn moves two squares, set en_passant_target to the passed-over square; otherwise clear en_passant_target
If en passant capture, remove the captured pawn behind destination
If promotion, replace pawn with chosen piece
Update castling_rights by removing rights if king or rook moved
Increment halfmove_clock, reset to 0 if pawn move or any capture
Switch turn to the other player
turn_order: Players alternate turns: white then black
win_conditions: Checkmate: opposing king is in check and has no legal moves
Resignation: a player resigns at any time
draw_conditions: Stalemate: player to move not in check and has no legal moves
Draw by agreement: both players agree to a draw
end_conditions: Game ends when a win or draw condition is met
